'''Puroth''' was a four-armed [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Eirrauc]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Eirrauc]], Puroth received [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] before ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Having constructed a blue-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], which she wielded in one of her four hands, Master Puroth selected the [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Nystammall]] as her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. Training him to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], Master Puroth worked with him well after his leaving her tutelage.<ref name="US" />

[[File:Grievous_SWCEUE.png|thumb|right|300px|Grievous stole the blade of Jedi Master Puroth]]
When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Master Puroth took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Leading [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in the war, Puroth continued to work with her former Padawan on many missions. Together, the pair were dispatched to the planet [[Tovarskl]] where they were assigned to [[Battle of Tovarskl|defend]] the Republic from the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. Encountering the [[Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies/Legends|leader]] of the Separatist army, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], Master Puroth engaged the [[Kaleesh/Legends|Kaleesh]] [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]]; because she could match Grievous while wielding four lightsabers at once, she proved to be one of the General's most challenging opponents. However, Grievous eventually [[Dismemberment/Legends|dismembered]] and killed Puroth. He then took her lightsaber as a prize, adding it to his collection of Jedi weapons.<ref name="US" />

Puroth's lightsaber was used by Grievous in battle with Jedi Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]. During Kenobi's battle with the cyborg, he was able to remove the hand that wielded Master Puroth's weapon.<ref name="Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith novelization">[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]]</ref>
